remember: Students will be able to recall the definition of management and its significance in an organization.
Students will be able to explain the functions of management.
Students will be able to identify the types of management (functional, departmental, line, and staff).
understand: Students will be able to understand the concept of planning and its importance in an organization.
Students will be able to explain the role of organization structure in achieving organizational goals.
Students will be able to analyze the functions of leadership and motivation in an organization.
apply: Students will be able to apply the principles of planning, organizing, leading, and controlling in a given situation.
Students will be able to use the concepts of management functions to solve a business problem.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the factors affecting management functions in an organization.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of management functions on organizational performance.

ncert_objectives: Explain the concept of management and its functions.
Distinguish between different types of management.
Discuss the importance of planning and organizational structure in an organization.
Explain the role of leadership and motivation in an organization.
Analyze the factors affecting management functions in an organization.
board_exam_objectives: Define management and explain its significance in an organization.
Explain the functions of management with suitable examples.
Distinguish between different types of management and explain their importance.
Discuss the importance of planning and organizational structure in achieving organizational goals.
Explain the role of leadership and motivation in an organization.
